text.title: Frontline Validation Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a frontline-validated as-is artifact. Subagent must satisfy this before model sign-off.

forbidden.pattern: listening_session_log entry with sequenced_after_observation == false (violates r2)
taxonomy_tag values outside the closed enum or multi-tagged observations (violates r3)
Documented vs observed divergences silently overwritten in reconciled_as_is (violates r5)
Listening session questions containing leading patterns: "don't you think", "wouldn't it be better if", "the new policy will" (violates r4)
observation_log entries summarized into sponsor language ("operator is happy with process")

allowed-transformations.transformation: Cluster overlapping observations across operators into a single divergence entry, preserving all operator_evidence_ids.
Mark a variant validation as partial (coverage_status: partial) when operator availability blocks 2-operator coverage; downstream model cannot ship until partial → full.
Promote a tribal_knowledge tag to deviation if observed in ≥ 2 operators independently.

list.item: Every operator was observed BEFORE the listening session
Every observation has exactly one taxonomy tag
Reconciled as-is explicitly lists divergences with evidence
Listening questions are open or behavioral (no leading)
Access agreement signed before observation began
